tags.name: uui-select
tags.description:
Custom element wrapping the native select element. Pass an array of options to it.
This is a formAssociated element, meaning it can participate in a native HTMLForm. A name:value pair will be submitted.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Text with which component should be labeled

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

attributes.name: disabledGroups
attributes.description: An array of options to be rendered by the element. Put the names of the groups you wanna disable, separated by a coma: `disabledGroups='fruits, vegetables'`. It's not case sensitive

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: This is a name property of the component.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Value of this form control.
If you dont want the setFormValue to be called on the ElementInternals, then prevent calling this method, by not calling super.value = newValue in your implementation of the value setter method.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Apply validation rule for requiring a value of this form control.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Set to true if the component should have an error state.Property is reflected to the corresponding attribute.

attributes.name: pristine
attributes.description: Determines wether the form control has been touched or interacted with, this determines wether the validation-status of this form control should be made visible.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Text with which component should be labeled

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Sets the input to readonly mode, meaning value cannot be changed but still able to read and select its content.

properties.name: options
disabledGroups
properties.description: An array of options to be rendered by the element. Put the names of the groups you wanna disable, separated by a coma: `disabledGroups='fruits, vegetables'`. It's not case sensitive

properties.name: formAssociated
properties.description:
This is a static class field indicating that the element is can be used inside a native form and participate in its events.
It may require a polyfill, check support here https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/HTMLElement/attachInternals.
Read more about form controls here https://web.dev/more-capable-form-controls/

properties.name: name
properties.description: This is a name property of the component.

properties.name: pristine

cssProperties.name: --uui-select-selected-option-background-color
cssProperties.description: Background color of the selected option
